arts.ttl: Player Leeds United sold in the summer could be about to join promotion rivals in January
arts.sum: Sunderland are looking to sign a midfielder on loan to add further depth, and while nothing is concrete between Kamara and the Stadium of Light, he’s an option being discussed by Leeds’ promotion rivals. Leeds United sanctioned multiple sales during the summer window after missing out on promotion, but it hasn’t stopped them from being in a strong position for automatic promotion this term.

arts.ttl: Euro club seal transfer agreement amid Leeds United January interest
arts.sum: Rennes had been reported to be interested in signing Illan Meslier from Leeds United this January, but they have instead agreed to sign another Championship promotion-winner in Brice Samba. It leaves them needing a long-term solution, to which Meslier was named as one of their potential options, amid links from the Sun claiming Manchester United are considering a move too.

arts.ttl: New Leeds United fitness update, two late fitness tests imminent
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Derby County tomorrow in their final game of 2024, looking to remain top of the pile after victory on Boxing Day. A huge boost for Leeds in December was the return of Ethan Ampadu well ahead of schedule, starting the last two games – once in centre-back and once in midfield.
